rawInput.query:
INSERT INTO todos (id, title, description, status) VALUES
  ('execute-parser-tests', 'Add execute parser tests', 'Add failing tests for execute results shaped like { content, detailedContent } and confirm the shared agent panel mapping receives stdout for those payloads.', 'pending'),
  ('execute-parser-fix', 'Fix execute result parsing', 'Update execute result parsing to read content/detailedContent payloads and strip shell-style <exited with exit code N> suffixes into parsed stdout/exitCode.', 'pending'),
  ('execute-verify', 'Verify execute output', 'Run targeted tests and desktop typecheck, then verify in the running Tauri app that the Execute tool shows stdout for pwd.', 'pending');
